error_signature: date picker not showing in formula builder
title: Date picker fields not visible in formula builder
symptom: Date and time picker fields inside a form container do not appear in the formula builder. Moving them outside the list container makes them visible.
applies_when: Using a form container within a list container
Trying to access date picker values in formula builder
not_this_if: Date pickers are placed outside of the list container
root_cause: In WeWeb, certain input fields, like date pickers, do not function as expected when nested inside repeating item containers. This can lead to confusion as some fields may work normally while others require custom handling.
fix_steps: Create a variable to store the date picker values.
Set up 'on input change' workflows for the date fields to update the variable.
Use the variable values in the save workflow when the user clicks the save button.
agent_instruction: Implement a variable to store date picker values and set up workflows to manage them.
